text:

> On Tue, May 27, 2014 at 1:57 AM, Stefan Bethke <stb@lassitu.de> wrote:

> 
>> Converted to new framework where it doesn't include the bin/ws3200 by default.

Im not sure I understand.  Why do you think the command line utility is no longer needed?


Stefan
